sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103851" key="thmelthmeni/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τημελ-τημενίς</orth>, <sense id="n103851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τήβεννος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τήμερα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τήμερον</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τήμερον</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
